flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Alexandria Technical & Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Alexandria Technical & Community College rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3k → 1.5k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Alexandria Technical & Community College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (66.8% → 76.8%).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Alexandria Technical & Community College are 8% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($49.4k vs $45.6k).
